summary: Full backend + frontend testing of PublicOS auth, issues, comments, admin moderation, and citizen↔admin end-to-end approval flow on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 29/29 pytest backend tests PASS. Critical user journeys verified in Playwright: register → submit issue (pending) → /me dashboard (pending badge) → admin login → admin queue → approve → public feed shows the approved issue. 'Made with Emergent' badge removed. Mobile responsive (375x800) has no horizontal scroll on /, /login, /register, /feed, /me, /submit. Admin role-gating works (citizens redirected to /me from /admin). One minor UX gap noted for ResetPassword (does not pre-validate token on load).

issues: When the token param is present but invalid/expired, the page currently shows the password-reset form. The user only sees the 'Invalid or expired reset link' error AFTER they submit the form. Spec asked for the 'Invalid reset link' screen (data-testid=reset-invalid) to render for an invalid token. Today reset-invalid only renders when the token query param is entirely missing. Recommend a pre-validation API call (e.g. GET /api/auth/reset-password/verify?token=...) on mount, or render the form but call out invalid token status proactively.

action_items: (Optional UX) Pre-validate the reset-password token on page mount so the 'Invalid reset link' screen (data-testid=reset-invalid) is shown immediately when the URL contains a bad/expired token, not only when the param is missing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is approaching 640 lines; once moderation/analytics expands further consider splitting into routers (auth.py, issues.py, admin.py) and a separate db.py.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True. Browsers ignore credentials with wildcard, but the cookie path is still set with samesite=none + secure. For tightening, set explicit origin (FRONTEND_URL) in production — works today only because the frontend also falls back to Bearer token in localStorage.
seed_admin idempotently refreshes the admin password from env on every boot — good. Confirmed working in tests.
Comments endpoint increments comment_count but there is no decrement on comment delete. No delete-comment route exists yet, so safe for MVP — flag if deletion is added later.

create_issue stamps timeline with raw datetime objects (mongo serializes fine) but the GET response returns ISO datetimes — frontend currently handles this OK; if formatting consistency matters, normalize at the boundary.
Demo issues seeded only once (count_documents({is_demo:true})>0 short-circuits). If demo data needs evolving, add a version flag or re-seed mechanism.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (register, submit, /me, admin approve→feed, forgot-password, mobile responsive, badge removal, role-gating)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@publicos.in / admin@1234 (verified working). Citizens registered fresh per-test with @example.com (pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD — note for future tests).
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_-prefixed citizen accounts and TEST_-prefixed issues during E2E. Backend has 10 PO-DEMO* approved issues seeded on startup (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_publicos_api.py and is fully self-contained: hits the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, exercises register/login/me/forgot/reset, /issues CRUD (approved-only feed verified), upvote toggle, comments, /me/issues, admin moderation (approve+reject), /admin/users (no password_hash leak verified), /admin/analytics aggregates. Run with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_publicos_api.py -v. IMPORTANT: pydantic EmailStr rejects '.test' TLD — use '@example.com' for fake emails. Playwright E2E verified: (a) header shows login/signup when logged out, avatar dropdown when logged in; (b) /submit redirects unauth → /login; (c) full 5-step submit wizard works end-to-end and shows tracking ID; (d) /me dashboard shows Pending badge on freshly-submitted issues; (e) admin approve flips issue to public feed within ~1s; (f) Made with Emergent badge has 0 occurrences on /; (g) mobile 375x800 has 0 horizontal overflow on /, /login, /register, /feed, /me, /submit; (h) IssueDetail /issue/PO-DEMO01 loads from backend with title, description, photos, location preview, and timeline. The Google OAuth flow was not tested end-to-end (live Google login required) but data-testid='google-login-btn' exists on /login and 'google-signup-btn' on /register.
rca of the issue: Only one minor UX gap found — see ResetPassword note above. No business-logic bugs.
